gate: P14-1 phone reconnection, thermal baseline, and stale-process check

notes: Thermalservice cached CPU/GPU values include stale high readings, but current HAL temperatures are in the low-to-mid 30 C range and battery is 28 C.
Cooling device battery state is nonzero while AC powered; treat as baseline telemetry, not a performance win.

redmagic_game_zone.assessment: ADB-launched native binaries under /data/local/tmp are not Android launcher apps and should not be assumed to receive Game Zone treatment. A user-mediated Termux/Game Space route may be feasible, but it requires a no-training validation before authority use.

pre_run_requirements: no stale phase11_runner, gemma4_layer_runner, p13h, or polymath_gemma4_gate process
battery temperature must be below 35 C
skin temperature must be below 40 C
storage free space must remain above 20G
RunPod must not serve runtime data path
segment_stop_conditions: alps-therm becomes valid and reaches 85 C
training/eval fails full-heldout identity or provenance telemetry
safety_policy.cooldown_rule: after each segment, wait until thermalservice status is 0 and battery/skin/CPU/GPU/NSP readings return near baseline before continuing
safety_policy.long_run_rule: long training remains blocked until P14-4, P14-5, and P14-6 pass

carry_forward_blockers: P14-2 compact manifest repair remains open.
P14-4 independent full-heldout evaluator repair remains open.
P14-6 short heldout proof must pass before any long run.
next_gate: P14-2 artifact quarantine and compact manifest repair, then P14-4 heldout evaluator repair
